purpose: Opt-in expressive background components for marketing, hero, auth, and splash surfaces. Not for dense tool UI.
usage: These are opt-in, expressive backgrounds. Use them behind hero/marketing/auth/splash content only — never as the default surface for dense product UI. Each component fills its parent container, so wrap it in a positioned element with an explicit height. Most render on a transparent canvas so content can sit on top. Install the listed dependencies before importing, and import the matching CSS file (when present) alongside the component.

backgrounds.name: LiquidEther
backgrounds.description: WebGL fluid simulation background that reacts to pointer movement with an idle auto-demo. Renders on a transparent canvas so it can sit behind content.

backgrounds.name: Prism
backgrounds.description: WebGL ray-marched prism with glow and film grain. Supports shader wobble (rotate), pointer hover tilt (hover), or full 3D rotation (3drotate). Renders on a transparent canvas so it can sit behind content.

backgrounds.name: DarkVeil
backgrounds.description: WebGL CPPN-driven dark gradient veil with optional hue shift, noise, scanlines, and warp distortion.

backgrounds.name: LightPillar
backgrounds.description: Ray-marched vertical light pillar with gradient color, rotation, glow, and film grain. Quality auto-downgrades on mobile/low-end devices.

backgrounds.name: Silk
backgrounds.description: Animated silk-like shader texture rendered through a react-three-fiber Canvas. Uses its own full-bleed canvas with no extra CSS.

backgrounds.name: FloatingLines
backgrounds.description: Layered flowing wave lines with gradient coloring, parallax, and pointer bend interaction across top/middle/bottom wave layers.

backgrounds.name: LightRays
backgrounds.description: WebGL volumetric light rays with configurable origin, color, spread, length, and mouse-following. Pointer-events disabled so it stays decorative.

backgrounds.name: PixelBlast
backgrounds.description: Pixelated dithered pattern with shape variants (square/circle/triangle/diamond), click ripples, and optional liquid distortion.

backgrounds.name: ColorBends
backgrounds.description: Warping color band field driven by a custom palette with rotation, warp strength, parallax, and pointer influence.

backgrounds.name: EvilEye
backgrounds.description: Fiery animated eye with flickering iris noise, glow, and pupil cursor tracking.

backgrounds.name: LineWaves
backgrounds.description: Abstract warped line waves with inner/outer line density, rotation, color cycling, and pointer-reactive distortion.

backgrounds.name: Radar
backgrounds.description: Radar scan animation with concentric rings, radial spokes, a rotating sweep beam, and pointer-driven center offset.

backgrounds.name: SoftAurora
backgrounds.description: Soft Perlin-noise aurora band with layered cosine-gradient colors and pointer-reactive offset.

backgrounds.name: Aurora
backgrounds.description: Classic animated aurora gradient ribbon with configurable three-stop color ramp, amplitude, blend, and speed.

backgrounds.name: Plasma
backgrounds.description: Ray-marched plasma effect with optional color tint, direction (forward/reverse/pingpong), scale, opacity, and pointer interaction.

backgrounds.name: PlasmaWave
backgrounds.description: Abstract two-color plasma wave bands with adjustable speeds, bend intensities, focal length, and rotation.

backgrounds.name: Particles
backgrounds.description: 3D particle field with configurable count, spread, colors, size randomness, rotation, and hover movement.

backgrounds.name: GradientBlinds
backgrounds.description: Animated gradient with vertical blind stripes, per-pixel noise, and a mouse-tracked spotlight. Supports mix-blend-mode compositing.

backgrounds.name: Grainient
backgrounds.description: Grainy three-color gradient with warp distortion, noise-driven rotation, and film grain. Pauses rendering when offscreen.

backgrounds.name: GridScan
backgrounds.description: Futuristic perspective grid with animated scan beam, post-processing (bloom, chromatic aberration), and optional webcam face / gyro tracking.

backgrounds.name: Beams
backgrounds.description: Animated 3D light beams over a noise-displaced plane with configurable width, height, count, color, and rotation.

backgrounds.name: PixelSnow
backgrounds.description: Volumetric pixelated snowfall with configurable flake size/shape, density, wind direction, and pixel resolution for a retro look.

backgrounds.name: Lightning
backgrounds.description: Raw-WebGL fractal lightning bolt with adjustable hue, horizontal offset, speed, intensity, and bolt size. No external dependencies.

backgrounds.name: PrismaticBurst
backgrounds.description: Ray-marched prismatic ray burst with rotate/rotate3d/hover animation, distortion, optional ray comb, and gradient or spectral colors.

backgrounds.name: Galaxy
backgrounds.description: Layered starfield galaxy with hue shift, density, glow, saturation, twinkle, auto rotation, and mouse repulsion.

backgrounds.name: Dither
backgrounds.description: Retro Bayer-dithered wave field with adjustable wave parameters, color count, pixel size, and mouse interaction.

backgrounds.name: FaultyTerminal
backgrounds.description: Glitching CRT terminal of animated glyphs with scanlines, flicker, chromatic aberration, curvature, tint, and page-load fade-in.

backgrounds.name: RippleGrid
backgrounds.description: Perspective grid with ripple distortion, optional rainbow cycling, glow, vignette, and pointer-driven ripples.

backgrounds.name: DotField
backgrounds.description: Canvas 2D + SVG dot grid with cursor bulge, gradient fill, radial glow, optional sparkle, and wave displacement. No external dependencies.

backgrounds.name: DotGrid
backgrounds.description: Interactive dot grid with GSAP inertia, proximity color shift, and click shockwaves. Requires the gsap InertiaPlugin.

backgrounds.name: Threads
backgrounds.description: Flowing Perlin-noise thread lines with adjustable color, amplitude, line spacing, and optional pointer interaction.

backgrounds.name: Hyperspeed
backgrounds.description: Animated highway of streaking car lights with multiple distortion presets, bloom, and speed-up on press. Heavily configurable via effectOptions (memoize it).

backgrounds.name: Iridescence
backgrounds.description: Iridescent flowing color shader with configurable base color, speed, amplitude, and optional mouse reactivity.

backgrounds.name: Waves
backgrounds.description: Canvas 2D Perlin-noise line waves with cursor spring interaction, configurable colors, speeds, amplitudes, and gaps. No external dependencies.

backgrounds.name: GridDistortion
backgrounds.description: Image-based grid distortion that warps a source image around the cursor with configurable grid density, strength, and relaxation.

backgrounds.name: Ballpit
backgrounds.description: Physics-based 3D ball pit with gravity, friction, wall bounce, and cursor-following control sphere. Uses an inline-styled canvas with no extra CSS.

backgrounds.name: Orb
backgrounds.description: Glowing animated orb with hue control, hover distortion, and optional rotate-on-hover.

backgrounds.name: LetterGlitch
backgrounds.description: Canvas grid of glitching characters with configurable colors, speed, smoothing, and optional vignettes. Uses inline styles with no extra CSS or dependencies.

backgrounds.name: GridMotion
backgrounds.description: Rotated grid of content tiles (text, JSX, or images) that scroll horizontally in opposite directions driven by mouse position.

backgrounds.name: ShapeGrid
backgrounds.description: Scrolling grid of shapes (square/hexagon/circle/triangle) with configurable direction, speed, border color, and a hover fill trail. No external dependencies.

backgrounds.name: LiquidChrome
backgrounds.description: Liquid chrome distortion shader with configurable base color, speed, amplitude, frequency, and mouse/touch ripple interaction.

backgrounds.name: Balatro
backgrounds.description: Spinning, pixel-filtered abstract paint swirl with three-color blend, contrast, lighting, and optional mouse interaction or continuous rotation.
